{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Slumbering Wraith’s arm
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] attached the [[Slumbering Wraith’s arm]] to his elbow.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] must handle the full force of the [[Slumbering Wraith’s arm]] when a seal wears off.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
